generated_oml:
instance BCSSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensors modeled within Building Information Modeling (BIM) as part of Building Control System (BCS) components to capture live operational data"
    DTDFVocab:producedData BCSSensorDataTransmitted
]

instance BCSSensorDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom BCSSensor
]

instance BCSSensorData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time operational data from Building Control System sensors"
    DTDFVocab:fromData BCSSensorDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataExchangeEnabler
]

instance BCSActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Actuators defined within Building Information Modeling (BIM) as part of Building Control System (BCS) components"
]

instance BCSController : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Controllers defined within Building Information Modeling (BIM) as part of Building Control System (BCS) components"
]

instance BIMModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Building Information Modeling (BIM) as the foundational geometric representation enriched with semantic definitions of Building Control System (BCS) components"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MDEEnabler
]

instance MDEEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Model-Driven Engineering principles for automatic extraction of structured representations from enriched BIM models and generation of deployable DT artifacts"
    DTDFVocab:enables PredictiveAnalyticsService, OptimizationService
]

instance DataExchangeEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Real-time data exchange mechanisms for continuous synchronization between physical infrastructure and digital twin"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService, DecisionMakingSupportService
]

instance RealTimeMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time monitoring service for infrastructure management in AECO domain"
    DTDFVocab:provides RealTimeMonitoringInsight, ControlAction
]

instance PredictiveAnalyticsService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Predictive analytics service for infrastructure management"
    DTDFVocab:provides PredictiveInsight
]

instance OptimizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Optimization service for infrastructure operational efficiency"
    DTDFVocab:provides OptimizationInsight
]

instance DecisionMakingSupportService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Decision-making support service for AECO stakeholders"
    DTDFVocab:provides DecisionSupportInsight
]

instance RealTimeMonitoringInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Interactive visualization of real-time system states for infrastructure monitoring"
]

instance ControlAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Control actions for physical infrastructure via Building Control System"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance PredictiveInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Predictive insights for maintenance and operational optimization"
]

instance OptimizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Optimization recommendations for building operations"
]

instance DecisionSupportInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Support for informed decision-making across building lifecycle stages"
]

instance BuildingEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Infrastructure environment for AECO digital twin operations"
    base:contains BCSSensor, BCSActuator, BCSController
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin lifecycle encompasses initial device modeling within BIM environments where Building Control Engineers define sensors, actuators, and controllers; Model-Driven Engineering (MDE) transformation to generate structured semantic representations and deployable artifacts with minimal manual intervention; operational phases featuring real-time data synchronization and interactive visualization for monitoring and control; and evolution through modular integration of custom services and analytics. Lifecycle governance is enforced via requirements derived from TwinLight and BOREALIS research projects."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Fidelity is evaluated using the Overall Digital Twin Entanglement (ODTE) metric, which quantifies the alignment between the digital twin and its physical counterpart to ensure interoperability and architectural soundness. The document does not specify additional validation methods, error correction mechanisms, or uncertainty quantification processes."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "Standardized extension points are implemented to ensure interoperability for integrating custom services and analytics. However, no specific industry standards (e.g., ISO, IEEE), compliance frameworks, or certification requirements are explicitly mentioned in the document."
]
